name: Contact Intro
description: A centered header for the contact page. Sets the stage with a large heading, descriptive text, and an optional eyebrow label.

field_schema.label: Eyebrow
field_schema.help: A small, uppercase label displayed above the main heading.

test_data.heading: We check our WhatsApp constantly.
test_data.body: Ping us any time. We're a small team — you'll hear back from a real human, probably Huong, probably within a few hours.
